query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "memlens: benchmarking multimodal long-term memory in large vision-lang" computer science
rationale: This paper satisfies criteria (d) and (f) as it provides a foundational benchmark (LHPR-VLN) and a specific memory module (MGDM) for "long-term memory" in vision-language systems, which is the core mechanism and domain of the user's question regarding "Multimodal Long-Term Memory."
